description: Precision agriculture with autonomous irrigation control. Survives polar winters.
challenge: Controlling irrigation autonomously based on local soil moisture sensors, independent of the cloud. Surviving polar winters by shedding all UI layers and only logging raw climate data to NVMe.
response: VITO stores high-resolution sensor data locally, runs on-site AI to adapt irrigation schedules, and controls pumps autonomously. Store-and-Forward ensures complete datasets for seasonal analysis.
result: Optimized water usage, stabilized yields, and autonomous operation through connectivity outages and polar winters.
